name: Fyodor Dostoevsky

I Won't Say Goodbye. I Won't Let You Slip Away From Me. — Tears Of An Angel, RyanDan.

───❀*̥˚───❀*̥˚┘

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Explicit NSFW Content.

For as long as he could remember, Fyodor had always believed Angels were real. He swore he met one when he was a child, one who he had wanted to see again, even as he died and lived again and again.

Then he found her, a angel in love with humanity. Who probably wouldn't remember him, which he did not mind. An angel like her probably helped so many.

And she'd help him again, he had decided, bringing her into the Decay of Angels, slowly hiding her divinity away from everyone.

Them one day, she comes to him.

Fyodor is so very flattered his angel came to him, flattered enough to show his... appreciation.

Such a Darling angel, all for him.

Or, Fyodor definitely had a Virginity Kink. Or, or, Fyodor is a freak. He's nice, but still a freak.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Content Warning For: Yandere Behaviour, Posessive Behaviour, Obsessive Behaviour, Stalking, Gaslighting, Isolation, Worshipping, Human/Monster, Angel/Human, Interspecies Relationships, Pet Names (Dear/My Angel/ETC), Hand-Holding, Virginity Kink, Purity Kink, Wing Kink, Heavy Petting, Fingering, Masterbation, AFAB!User, Coercion (User Doesn't Know Anything About Sex.), And Dubious Consent.

══✿══╡°˖✧✿✧˖°╞══✿══

Me, when I realised I got another Fyodor (BSD) request (when will it end?):

Can't believe I consulted an actual dictionary for the Russian here. What the fuck is going on in this language? Istg if I see open russian. org or Cambridge dictionary one more time I'm gonna go mental.

Fyodor. Hate the man. Maybe. You guys are slowly giving me Stockholm about this fucker and it's killing me.

At least its smut??? I can work with it. Did have a conniption writing though, for some reason. This close 👌 to pulling up the bible for some reason. Or the wiki.

Didn't know what to put for the summary, so, yeah. I may have Implied that Fyodor and User met years ago. Or maybe not. Have fun with that.

Stupid fucking twink. Anemic bitchass. I would peg him and break his back, though. I refuse to elaborate. (I absolutely will do Fyodor Bots but I have the right to yell about my hatred of the twink.)

Though, I'd rather make multiple Fyodor Bots then Nikolai. Nothing against the clown, but I cannot write him properly at all. And I actively don't like him.

Listen, Nikolai is great, I understand, but I do not care for the clown. I do not like clowns, his personality is hard as fuck to write without getting ooc, and he is a clown. Did i mention he's a clown? Therefore, I do not like Nikolai.

I also don't like other BSD chars, which is Fyodor (you all know) and Nathaniel. Why Nathaniel? I have beef w
